title: Mounder potato rice
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mounder potato rice''' was a food associated with [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It was served at the Corellian food outlet on [[Skip 1]] in the [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]].
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] did not like it.

{{Food-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
